name: fiberx
description: FiberX — Fiber Wallet Connect SDK. Drop-in wallet connection, invoices, readiness checks, and payment status UI for Fiber Network apps.

scripts.dev: pnpm build:libs && concurrently -n proxy,demo -c blue,magenta "pnpm dev:proxy" "pnpm dev:demo"
scripts.build: pnpm build:libs && pnpm --filter @fiberx/proxy build && pnpm --filter @fiberx/demo build
